resources.string:
Welcome to the Vibe Calculator! 🌀

This is NOT a number calculator. It's a mood processor.

1. Tap mood buttons to build your emotional equation
2. Use + to combine moods or − to cancel them out
3. Press CLR to start fresh
4. Hit VIBE CHECK to calculate your overall vibe!

Each mood has a hidden energy score. Your final vibe is calculated from the combination — and you'll get a unique vibe result every time.

Have fun exploring your feelings! 💜
